center.name: 洛哈 (厄瓜多爾)
center.summary: 洛哈 (厄瓜多爾)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Red-faced parrot，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Currently, the red-faced parrot has only been found in Ecuador and Peru, mostly between the eastern Andes mountain range of southern Ecuador and the northwest region of Peru. More specifically, they inhabit mild forests of the provinces of Azuay, Loja and Morona-Santiago and the Piura department in Peru.{{Cite journal |last1=Toyne |first1=E
